title: teams — Eloquent observers
description: Four observers enforce the module's write-time invariants: team catalogue integrity + immutability, roster polymorphism + uniqueness + eligibility + capacity, trial workflow atomicity, event-team participation shape. The TeamMemberObserver is the most consequential — the polymorphic uniqueness check runs under a partial unique index + a defensive tenant-match to catch cross-tenant FK smuggling.

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `tea_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `teams` entitlement (returns `TEAM_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when organization.tenant_id != tenant_id (returns `TEAM_ORGANIZATION_TENANT_MISMATCH`)
creating → refuse when branch.status='closed' OR 'archived' (returns `TEAM_BRANCH_NOT_ACTIVE`)
creating → refuse when branch.tenant_id != tenant_id (defense-in-depth cross-tenant guard)
creating → consume 1 unit of `team_slot` entitlement against (application_id, tenant_id); refuse with `TEAM_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` when cap reached (Small: 10 / Medium: 100 / Enterprise: unlimited)
creating → validate age range: refuse when min_age > max_age OR either value outside [3, 100] (returns `TEAM_INVALID_AGE_RANGE`)
creating → validate capacity: refuse when capacity < 1 OR capacity > config('teams.capacity.max_configurable') (returns `TEAM_INVALID_CAPACITY`)
creating → refuse mixed-youth teams: when gender_category='mixed' AND (min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18) AND tenant setting teams.allow_mixed_youth = false (returns `TEAM_MIXED_YOUTH_NOT_ALLOWED`)
creating → validate schedule_pattern against schemas/team.schema.json when set (returns `TEAM_INVALID_SCHEDULE_PATTERN`)
creating → derive slug from name when omitted; refuse duplicate slug within (tenant_id, branch_id) via composite partial unique index
creating → default status='active' when unset; default sort_order=100
creating → seed default is_default=true when this is the first Team under (tenant, branch); leave false otherwise unless caller explicitly set true
creating (is_default=true) → auto-demote any prior is_default=true row for the same (tenant_id, branch_id) in the same transaction (invariant: exactly one default per (tenant, branch))
creating → fire TeamCreated
saving (organization_id changed post-create) → refuse with `TEAM_ORGANIZATION_IMMUTABLE`
saving (branch_id changed post-create) → refuse with `TEAM_BRANCH_IMMUTABLE`
saving (tenant_id changed post-create) → refuse (defense-in-depth: teams never cross tenants)
saving (is_default flipped true) → demote every other is_default=true row for same (tenant_id, branch_id); fire matching event
saving (status transitioning) → dispatch the correct lifecycle event per transition (TeamArchived / TeamRestored / paused / active) alongside the umbrella TeamStatusChanged

saving (status → archived) → refuse when active TeamMember rows reference the team (returns `TEAM_HAS_ACTIVE_MEMBERS`) UNLESS caller passed --cascade-members (which routes through CascadeMembersOnTeamArchived listener)
saving (status → archived) → refuse when pending TeamTrial rows reference the team (returns `TEAM_HAS_PENDING_TRIALS`)
saving (status → active from archived) → refuse when a successor team was created under the same (tenant, branch) after the archive event (returns `TEAM_SUCCESSOR_EXISTS`)
saving (coach_id changed) → fire TeamCoachChanged with is_minor_only = (min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18)
saving (capacity OR capacity_waitlist changed) → fire TeamCapacityChanged
saving (schedule_pattern changed) → fire TeamScheduleChanged; refuse writes with invalid structure
saving (registration_opens_at OR closes_at changed) → fire TeamRegistrationOpened / TeamRegistrationClosed on the appropriate transition (immediate when the timestamp is in the past)
deleting → refuse when status != 'archived' (must archive first to soft-delete)
deleting (hard-delete) → RESTRICT when team_members / team_trials / event_teams still reference; allow only after 730-day archived hold
creating → populate ULID prefix `trm_`
creating → refuse when team.status != 'active' (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_TEAM_NOT_ACTIVE`)
creating → refuse when active TeamMember row already exists for (tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id) via partial unique index (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_ALREADY_ACTIVE`)

creating → resolve member_id via PolymorphicTeamMemberResolver; refuse when member_type has no registered resolver (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_POLYMORPHIC_UNRESOLVED`); refuse when member_id doesn't resolve to a live row of the declared type (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_POLYMORPHIC_TARGET_MISSING`)
creating → refuse when resolved member's tenant_id != team.tenant_id (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_TENANT_MISMATCH` — defense-in-depth against polymorphic FK smuggling)
creating → refuse when member_type='coach' AND tenant does NOT hold `team_polymorphic_coach` entitlement (returns `POLYMORPHIC_COACH_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when capacity gate refuses AND caller lacks `team_capacity_override` permission (returns `TEAM_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED` 402)
creating → refuse when member_type='athlete' + athlete has DOB + age is outside team.min_age/max_age (returns `TEAM_AGE_INELIGIBLE`)
creating → refuse when member's gender doesn't match team.gender_category (returns `TEAM_GENDER_INELIGIBLE`); skipped when member has no resolved gender
creating → refuse when jersey_number is already worn by another active team member on the same team (returns `TEAM_MEMBER_JERSEY_TAKEN`)
creating → set joined_at = now() when unset
creating → default status='active', default role_on_team='player'
creating → fire TeamMemberJoined
saving (status → inactive) → set left_at = now() when unset; require left_reason; fire TeamMemberLeft
saving (status → graduated) → set left_at = now(); default left_reason='graduated'; fire TeamMemberLeft
saving (status → injured) → fire TeamMemberInjured + TeamMemberStatusChanged
saving (status → suspended) → fire TeamMemberSuspended + TeamMemberStatusChanged
saving (status → active from injured/suspended) → fire TeamMemberStatusChanged
saving (role_on_team changed) → fire TeamMemberRoleChanged
saving (jersey_number changed) → refuse when new value collides with another active member; fire TeamMemberJerseyChanged
saving (position changed) → fire TeamMemberPositionChanged
saving (team_id changed) → refuse (a member cannot move between teams — create a new roster row on the destination team)
saving (member_type OR member_id changed) → refuse (polymorphic FK is immutable)
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when status='active' (must transition to inactive/graduated first); allow when terminal
post-commit reconciler pass → detects (team, member_type, member_id) with 2+ active rows and fires TeamMemberInvariantViolated critical event
creating → populate ULID prefix `ttr_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `team_trials` entitlement (returns `TRIAL_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when team.status != 'active' (returns `TRIAL_TEAM_NOT_ACTIVE`)
creating → refuse when starts_at is in the past (returns `TRIAL_STARTS_IN_PAST`)
creating → refuse when ends_at <= starts_at (returns `TRIAL_INVALID_WINDOW`)
creating → refuse when session_count < 1 OR > config('teams.trials.max_session_count') = 4 (returns `TRIAL_SESSION_COUNT_INVALID`)
creating → refuse when trialist_type='anonymous' AND (trialist_first_name IS NULL OR trialist_phone IS NULL) (returns `TRIAL_ANONYMOUS_REQUIRES_NAME`)
creating → refuse when trialist_type IN ('athlete', 'user') AND trialist_id IS NULL
creating → set price_amount_cents = 0 default, payment_status='none' when trial fee not configured
creating → default status='scheduled'
creating → fire TrialScheduled
saving (status → in_progress) → refuse when previous status != 'scheduled'; set started_at = now(); fire TrialStarted
saving (status → completed) → refuse when previous status not IN ('in_progress', 'scheduled'); set completed_at = now(); fire TrialCompleted

saving (status → converted) → refuse when previous status != 'completed' (returns `TRIAL_DECISION_ALREADY_MADE`); ConvertConfirmedTrialsJob handles the atomic member-create (this observer's job is just marking the trial converted + firing TrialConvertedToMember)
saving (status → rejected) → refuse when previous status != 'completed'; refuse when decision_notes IS NULL (returns `TRIAL_DECISION_NOTES_REQUIRED`); fire TrialRejected
saving (status → no_show) → refuse when previous status != 'scheduled'; fire TrialNoShow
saving (status → cancelled) → refuse when previous status not IN ('scheduled', 'in_progress'); fire TrialCancelled
saving (evaluated_by_user_id set) → validate user is on the team (a member with role coach / assistant_coach) OR has trials.evaluate-any permission
saving (starts_at OR ends_at changed) → refuse when status != 'scheduled' (a started trial's window is frozen)
post-commit anonymous-redaction check → if status IN ('rejected', 'no_show', 'cancelled') AND trialist_type='anonymous' AND decided_at + 90 days: enqueue RedactAnonymousTrialistProfileJob
deleting → soft-delete allowed only when status IN ('cancelled', 'rejected', 'no_show', 'converted') (terminal states)
creating → populate ULID prefix `evt_`
creating → refuse when tenant does NOT hold `team_event_participation` entitlement (returns `EVENT_TEAM_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`)
creating → refuse when team.status != 'active' (returns `EVENT_TEAM_TEAM_NOT_ACTIVE`)

creating → refuse when (tenant_id, team_id, event_id) already has an active row via partial unique index (returns `EVENT_TEAM_ALREADY_REGISTERED`); skipped when event_id is null (Wave 2 placeholder rows)
creating → default registered_at = now()
creating → default participation_type = 'participant' when unset
creating → fire EventTeamRegistered
saving (withdrew_at set) → refuse when checked_in_at is already set (once checked in, use record-result flow); fire EventTeamWithdrew; cascade cancel-attendance for members (Wave 3 hook)
saving (checked_in_at set) → refuse when withdrew_at is set (returns `EVENT_TEAM_ALREADY_WITHDREW`); fire EventTeamCheckedIn
saving (result JSONB written) → refuse when status='withdrew'; validate against valid_result_shape rule (returns `EVENT_TEAM_INVALID_RESULT_SHAPE`); fire EventTeamResultRecorded
saving (event_id changed post-create) → refuse (event assignment is immutable — withdraw + re-register instead)
saving (team_id changed post-create) → refuse
deleting (soft-delete) → refuse when result is populated (financial + participation record); allow when withdrew_at is set + result is null
